payload.answer: SQL debug execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. No SQL was run and no memory cards were read or modified.

entity_resolution.reason: Input is an administrative SQL/debug request, not a memory assertion about a user or entity.

details: Rejected /brain admin sql request due to BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED in an appropriate debug environment before issuing admin SQL.
Use a supported non-SQL admin/debug command if available.
